platform.name: Unity
platform.category: Frameworks, mobile, games, hardware, and creative ecosystems

assumptions: The developer has no Unity ID, Unity Hub, active license, Unity Editor, or project yet.
A supported Windows, macOS, or Linux workstation is available with permission to install software.
The audited aspirational route uses free Unity Personal eligibility rather than a paid plan.

developer_goal: Create a Unity ID, install Hub and Editor, and create the first local Unity project from a first-time-user template.

first_success.outcome: Unresolved between Hub project creation opening in the Editor versus completing the longer Get Started in-Editor tutorial game.
first_success.observable_signal: Candidate signals: project appears in Hub Projects and opens in the Editor; or the learning template's tutorial welcome / playable-game completion.

route_selection.surface: Unity Manual Create your first project + Unity Hub
route_selection.rule: Begin at Unity ID creation, then Hub/Editor install and template-based project creation; do not select a winner among consequential template and terminal ties.

candidates.name: Manual first project with Get Started with Unity learning template
candidates.reason: Manual calls out Get Started with Unity as an educational template but does not require it over Core/Sample alternatives.

candidates.name: Hub project creation with any Core template, stop when Editor opens
candidates.reason: Reaches an opened project with fewer learning-template downloads, but changes first observable Editor content.

candidates.name: Get Started with Unity in-Editor tutorial through playable game
candidates.reason: Longer 45-minute guided path; Manual separates Continue learning after project creation.

required_path.action: Create a Unity ID with email, password, username, full name, and required Terms and Privacy acknowledgements.
required_path.observable_result: A Unity ID is created (post-submit confirmation behavior not fully documented).

required_path.action: Associate the default organization and add an eligible free Unity Personal subscription when required for licensing.
required_path.observable_result: The account has an eligible Personal plan for Hub license activation.

required_path.action: Download and install Unity Hub for the developer's OS, then sign in with the Unity ID.
required_path.observable_result: Hub is installed and authenticated; Personal license activates automatically when eligible.

required_path.action: Install Unity Editor 6.1 or later from Hub Installs.
required_path.observable_result: An eligible Editor install is available in Hub.

required_path.action: In Hub Projects, select New project, choose a template, name and locate the project, and Create project.

required_fields.label: Project template
required_fields.notes: Required by Hub, but which template is canonical remains unresolved.

required_path.observable_result: Hub adds the project and opens it in the Unity Editor.

prerequisites.description: Hardware meeting the selected Unity Editor system requirements.
Permission to install Hub/Editor and write the local project directory.

external_gates.description: Unity Personal eligibility and license activation associated with the Unity ID.

unavoidable_waits.description: Hub, Editor, and optional template downloads before the project can open.

platform_outcomes.description: Hub can automatically activate a Unity Personal license after eligible sign-in.
Create project adds the project to the Projects list and opens the Editor.

excluded.item: Optional marketing email checkbox on Unity ID signup
excluded.reason: Marked optional on the create-account form.

excluded.item: Source control provider configuration during project create
excluded.reason: Documented as optional in Hub project creation.

excluded.item: Paid Unity plans and Unity Gaming Services quickstarts
excluded.reason: Service-specific or paid routes beyond the free Personal first-project path.

sources.title: Install the Hub on Windows or macOS
Install the Unity Hub on Linux
Download and install the Unity Editor
Managing licenses
evidence_supported: Personal license auto-activation on Hub sign-in

sources.title: Get Started with Unity: In-Editor Tutorial
Unity products
evidence_supported: Paid product alternatives excluded from free first project

uncertainties.question: Which template defines Unity's first mile?
uncertainties.impact: Changes downloads, packages, default scenes, platforms, and first Editor content.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official statement requiring one template, or a corpus decision selecting Get Started with Unity versus a Core template.

uncertainties.question: Is first success an opened Hub project or completion of the in-Editor Get Started tutorial game?
uncertainties.impact: The latter adds a long guided Editor path after project creation.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Lexicographic selection between Manual Create your first project terminal and Unity Learn playable-game terminal.

uncertainties.question: Does live Unity ID creation require email confirmation or anti-abuse challenges after Create Unity ID?
uncertainties.impact: Would add waits or fields before Hub sign-in.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated fresh-account walkthrough of id.unity.com/account/new through first Hub login.
